Visit the colonial city and the imperial city, be astounded by the impressive archaeological sites and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet on the way to the magnificent citadel and mountain of Machu Picchu.

name: AIR, SEA AND LAND - 7COXOL
description: Explore Peru by air, sea and land for eight exciting days discovering the archaeological, cultural and natural treasures of the country. Discover the mysterious Nasca lines from the sky, sail to the abundant fauna of the wild Ballestas Islands and explore by land the sites of the Inca Empire and the beautiful colonial cities founded by Spanish conquistadors.

name: ANDEAN EXPERIENCE - 7COXOL
description: Enjoy the best of Peru with this circuit from and to Lima. Visit beautiful colonial cities, the legacy of ancient civilisations and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet. Meet the descendants of the Incas and the camelids of the Andes. Discover the Sacred Valley of the Incas, observe how the past is still alive in the islands of Lake Titicaca and undertake the pilgrimage to the peaks of the Andes to tour the magnificent citadel and mountain of Machu Picchu.

name: EXPLORE PERU - 7COXOL
description: Explore Peru and know its heritage, fauna and inhabitants during 10 dreamy days of crossing the country. This unforgettable circuit from and to Lima visits beautiful colonial cities, archeological sites left by ancient civilizations and some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet. Admire the condor of the Colca Valley and the native camelids of the Andes. Discover the Sacred Valley of the Incas, observe how the past lives on the islands of Lake Titicaca and ascends Machu Picchu, the 'lost city of the Incas'.

name: SPECIAL PERU - 7COXOL
description: As cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to 11 UNESCO World Heritage Sites listed, Peru is quite a special destination as you will discover over six fascinating days exploring the country. Visit beautiful colonial cities, impressive archaeological sites and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain.

name: EXPEDITION TO SALKANTAY - 7COXOL
description: When you arrive in Cusco, prepare to walk for several days through forests, discovering sites of ancient with fortifications and Inca cities, and all the while enjoying majestic views until reaching the impressive Salkantay mountain. In addition, you will discover the ancient capital of the Incas and the impressive historic sanctuary of Machu Picchu.

name: SOFT ADVENTURE - 7COXOL
description: Enjoy a journey that will take you to explore the capital of Peru and know its main attractions such as museums, the historic centre, its cuisine and the wonderful views of the Pacific Ocean from the seafront. Lima is the only South American capital facing the sea, which allows you to practice water activities such as kayaking or surfing. Delight yourself with the history and culture of Cusco. You will visit the main attractions of the city, as well as the Wonder of the World: Machu Picchu.

name: CUSCO FAMILY JOURNEY - 7COXOL
description: Cusco is a special destination that attracts visitors from all over the world for its history, culture, architecture, gastronomy, tradition and mysticism. It is also the capital of one of the most enigmatic and impressive civilizations the world has seen - the Incas. You will be able to enjoy its surroundings during eight days that will take you to the Sacred Valley, archaeological sites, colonial buildings, restaurants, local markets and many more that will show you the essence of the Andes.

name: GO LOCAL - 7COXOL
description: Peru is a special destination that attracts visitors from all over the world to discover the country’s history, culture, architecture, gastronomy, traditions, and mysticism. But one of the best characteristics of the country is its friendly, welcoming people who wholeheartedly share their culture with visitors. Get to know the locals and enjoy Peru’s surroundings during eight days that take you to vast valleys, archaeological gems, colonial buildings, appetizing restaurants, local markets and more that show you the essence of the country.

name: REGIONAL FLAVOURS - 7COXOL
description: Lima is the capital of Peru, and recently declared Gastronomical Capital of America; a special destination to discover during four wonderful days visiting restaurants, the beautiful historic centre and colonial mansions. Also, visit the capital of the Inca Empire and taste the traditional recipes of the region and its local ingredients.

name: Huancaya, tesoro escondido
description: Embárcate en un viaje único de 5 días, en el que viajarás desde el desierto costero hasta la sierra peruana para llegar a Huancaya (3554 msnm), uno de los refugios naturales más bellos del país. Ubicada dentro de la Reserva Paisajística Nor Yauyos-Cochas, esta área posee uno de los paisajes alto andinos más fascinantes del Perú con numerosas cascadas y lagunas esmeraldas, formadas por el nacimiento de las aguas del río Cañete. Un lugar perfecto para descansar, relajarse y ponerse en contacto con la naturaleza a solo unas horas de la ciudad de Lima.

name: CAMINO INCA PROMOCIÓN ESPECIAL
description: Llegue a Cusco para recorrer el legendario Camino Inca durante 4 días. Esta experiencia de cultura y aventura incluye el paso por asombrosos paisajes, construcciones Inca y los servicios necesarios durante la caminata. Al final de la caminata, disfrute de la mayor recompensa: Machu Picchu, Patrimonio de la Humanidad y una de las Nuevas Siete Maravillas del Mundo.

name: PERU PUR ZUBUCHER REISE
description: Die Sonne war die Göttin der Inkas: Sie war in ihrer Kultur allgegenwärtig und verhalf ihnen  dazu, das größte Reich im präkolumbianischen Amerika zu werden. Trotz Jahrhunderte von  spanischer Kolonialherrschaft ist das hervorragende kulturelle und materielle Erbe der Inkas ausgezeichnet erhalten geblieben. Die elftägige Entdeckungsreise durch Peru bringt Sie in die  berühmtesten Orte des Reiches, wie Arequipa, Colca Canyon, Titicacasee, das Heilige Tal, Machu Picchu und Cusco, die historische Hauptstadt der Inkas.

name: AMANECERES DEL INCA PROMOCIONAL
description: El Imperio inca existió apenas un siglo, pero en ese poco tiempo dejó un legado patrimonial que ha convertido a Perú en uno de los países con más riqueza cultural de las Américas. Durante ocho días conozca los principales atractivos del país, desde Lima en la costa pacífica hasta Machu Picchu, la ‘ciudad perdida de los incas’, en la cima de los Andes. Descubre hermosas ciudades coloniales, las ruinas de antiguas civilizaciones y explora algunos de los paisajes más espectaculares del planeta – una experiencia inolvidable.

name: LO MEJOR EN FAMILIA CON BELMOND
description: Descubre el Perú y crea maravillosos recuerdos en este viaje enfocado para familias con servicios de lujo.  Este recorrido de ocho días incluye visitas a los lugares más emblemáticos del país como el Valle Sagrado, Cusco y, por supuesto, la maravillosa ciudadela Inca de Machu Picchu. Disfruta también de Lima y maravíllate con todo lo que la capital del Perú, cosmopolita y moderna, tiene para ofrecerles.

name: PERÚ A TRAVÉS DE SUS SABORES
Selva Dulce
description: La ciudad de Tarapoto, ubicada en la selva norte del Perú, es el punto de partida ideal para conocer algunos de los rincones más espectaculares de esta región. Descubra cataratas, ríos, diversidad biológica y pruebe los deliciosos chocolates hechos con el mejor cacao local, que endulzarán aún más el recorrido.

name: PERU ESPECIAL CON VINICUNCA
description: Cuna de una de las civilizaciones más enigmáticas de la historia y poseedora de 11 Patrimonios de la Humanidad, Perú es un destino más que especial, como descubrirás durante seis fascinantes días recorriendo el país. Visita hermosas ciudades coloniales, impresionantes ruinas arqueológicas y explora algunos de los paisajes más espectaculares del planeta camino de la magnífica ciudadela y montaña de Machu Picchu.

name: PERU Y BOLIVIA, LA GRAN AVENTURA CON SALAR DE UYUNI
AMANECER EN VINICUNCA
description: Vinicunca o Winikunka, llamada también Montaña de Siete Colores, Montaña Arcoíris o Montaña de Colores es una montaña del Perú con una altitud de 5.200 msnm. Está situada en el camino al Nevado Ausangate, en los Andes del Perú, Región Cusco, provincia de Canchis.

name: AMANECERES DEL INCA
description: El Imperio inca existió apenas un siglo, pero en ese poco tiempo dejó un legado patrimonial que ha convertido a Perú en uno de los países con más riqueza cultural de las Américas. Durante ocho días conozca los principales atractivos del país, desde Lima en la costa pacífica hasta Machu Picchu, la ‘ciudad perdida de los incas’, en la cima de los Andes. Descubre hermosas ciudades coloniales, las ruinas de antiguas civilizaciones y explora algunos de los paisajes más espectaculares del planeta - una experiencia inolvidable.

name: EXPERIENCIA ANDINA
description: Disfruta a lo grande de lo mejor de Perú con este circuito desde Lima y hasta Puno. Visita hermosas ciudades coloniales, los remanentes de antiguas civilizaciones y explora algunos de los paisajes más espectaculares del planeta. Conoce a los descendientes de los incas y a los camélidos autóctonos de los Andes. Descubre el Valle Sagrado de los incas, observa cómo el pasado sigue vivo en las islas del Lago Titicaca y emprende el peregrinaje a los picos de los Andes para recorrer la magnífica ciudadela y montaña de Machu Picchu.

name: EXPLORA PERU
description: Explora Perú y conoce a su patrimonio, fauna y habitantes durante 10 días de ensueño atravesando el país. Este inolvidable circuito desde y hasta Lima visita hermosas ciudades coloniales, las ruinas de antiguas civilizaciones y algunos de los paisajes más espectaculares del planeta. Admira los cóndores del Valle del Colca y a los camélidos autóctonos de los Andes. Descubre el Valle Sagrado de los incas, observa cómo el pasado sigue vivo en las islas del Lago Titicaca y asciende Machu Picchu, la ‘ciudad perdida de los incas’.

name: GO LOCAL RENOVADO
description: Al viajar buscamos disfrutar la mejor experiencia posible. Hoy en día, los viajeros son más curiosos, aventureros y ansiosos por absorber todo lo que un destino tiene para ofrecer. Perú tiene una cultura maravillosa e hipnotizante, con raíces fuertes y mezclas sorprendentes que han combinado una incalculable variedad de costumbres en un mismo lugar.

name: INSPIRATE EN MACHU PICCHU
description: En un país repleto de monumentos históricos, hay uno que destaca por encima de todos - la impresionante ‘ciudad perdida de los incas’ de Machu Picchu. Inspírate en lo más hermoso de Perú con este recorrido de siete días por el país, empezando en la capital, Lima, explorando la antigua sede del Imperio inca en Cusco, descubriendo los sitios arqueológicos de los incas en el Valle Sagrado y culminando con una emocionante visita a Machu Picchu en la cima de los Andes. Un viaje de ensueño que jamás olvidarás.

name: PERU Y BOLIVIA LA GRAN AVENTURA CON SALAR DE UYUNI
PERU ESPECIAL
description: Cuna de una de las civilizaciones más enigmáticas de la historia y poseedora de 11 Patrimonios de la Humanidad, Perú es un destino más que especial, como descubrirás durante seis fascinantes días recorriendo el país. Visita hermosas ciudades coloniales, impresionantes ruinas arqueológicas y explora algunos de los paisajes más espectaculares del planeta camino de la magnífica ciudadela y montaña de Machu Picchu.

name: PERU HIGHLIGHTS + VINICUNCA
description: Disfruta a lo grande de lo mejor de Perú con este circuito desde Lima hasta Cusco. Visita hermosas ciudades coloniales, las ruinas de antiguas civilizaciones y explora algunos de los paisajes más espectaculares del planeta. Conoce a los descendientes de los incas, a los camélidos autóctonos de los Andes, y emprende el peregrinaje a los picos de los Andes para recorrer la magnífica ciudadela y montaña de Machu Picchu. El tamaño de los grupos es variable con mínimo 1 y máximo 12 pasajeros.

name: PERU HIGHLIGHTS
description: Disfruta a lo grande de lo mejor de Perú con este circuito desde Lima hasta Cusco. Visita hermosas ciudades coloniales, las ruinas de antiguas civilizaciones y explora algunos de los paisajes más espectaculares del planeta. Conoce a los descendientes de los incas, a los camélidos autóctonos de los Andes, y emprende el peregrinaje a los picos de los Andes para recorrer la magnífica ciudadela y montaña de Machu Picchu.

name: PERU EN SEMANA SANTA
description: Cuna de una de las civilizaciones más enigmáticas de la historia y poseedora de 11 Patrimonios de la Humanidad, Perú es un destino más que especial, como descubrirás durante seis fascinantes días recorriendo el país. Visita hermosas ciudades coloniales, impresionantes ruinas arqueológicas y explora algunos de los paisajes más espectaculares del planeta camino de la magnífica ciudadela y montaña de Machu Picchu.

name: CUSCO VIRTUOSO
description: Descubre el legado Inca y las obras de civilizaciones precolombinas en Cusco. Visita los lugares más emblemáticos de la ciudad: sus calles empedradas, edificios de arquitectura Inca y española y sus bellas plazas. Disfruta del impresionante viaje en tren y servicio de lujo, cuyo recorrido pasa por espectaculares paisajes andinos y cuyo destino es la maravillosa ciudadela de Machu Picchu.

name: SABORES Y SENSACIONES DE LIMA
description: La Ciudad de Lima, antiguamente llamada Ciudad de los Reyes, fue la ciudad más importante de América, la cual con el paso del tiempo acogió a inmigrantes de todas partes del mundo. Hoy, la capital del Perú es una ciudad moderna y llena de mestizaje que se deja apreciar en su gastronomía, costumbres y arquitectura.Disfruta de lo mejor de Lima durante 4 días llenos de sabor, historia y tradición.

name: SPIRIT OF THE WATER & ENIGMA NAZCA LINES
PERU AUTENTICO
description: El Sol fue el dios más importante de la cultura inca y bañó con su luz al imperio más grande de la América precolombina, dejando una herencia cultural y patrimonial que brilla – hasta la actualidad – con luz propia. En este recorrido de ocho días por el Perú, descubre por qué ese legado no deja de asombrar al mundo mientras visitas los lugares más emblemáticos de Cusco y Valle Sagrado, incluyendo la maravillosa ciudadela de Machu Picchu, gozando de servicios de lujo. Disfruta también de Lima y maravíllate con todo lo que la capital del Perú, cosmopolita y moderna, tiene para ofrecer.

name: LO MEJOR EN FAMILIA
description: Descubre el Perú y crea maravillosos recuerdos en este viaje enfocado para familias con servicios de lujo.  Este recorrido de siete días incluye visitas a los lugares más emblemáticos del país como el Valle Sagrado, Cusco y, por supuesto, la maravillosa ciudadela Inca de Machu Picchu. Disfruta también de Lima y maravíllate con todo lo que la capital del Perú, cosmopolita y moderna, tiene para ofrecerles.

name: JOYAS DEL IMPERIO INCA
description: Inicia tu recorrido en Lima, donde te asombrarás con los museos, centro histórico y todo lo que la capital del Perú, cosmopolita y moderna, tiene para ofrecer a los viajeros. Continúa hacia Cusco donde visitarás los lugares más emblemáticos de la capital del Imperio Inca, así como el Valle Sagrado, los sitios arqueológicos de Maras, Moray, Ollantaytambo, el centro textil de Awanakancha y, por supuesto, la maravillosa ciudadela de Machu Picchu. Descubre el legado material e inmaterial que se mantiene vivo en Lima y Cusco.

name: Cusco at First Sight
description: Cusco is a very special destination, as you will discover during five fascinating days touring its main attractions. Visit the imperial city, impressive archaeological sites and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet on the way to the magnificent citadel and mountain of Machu Picchu.

name: Irresistible Lima
description: Lima is the capital of Peru, a special destination that you will discover during four wonderful days visiting its main attractions. Know its exquisite cuisine, the beautiful historic center with its squares and old residences, the Larco Museum, the districts of Miraflores and Barranco, wonderful boardwalk. The group size varies but typically ranges from 6 to 10 passengers.

name: CUSCO EXPRESS
description: Cusco is a more than special destination, as you will discover for three fascinating days exploring its main attractions. Visit the Imperial City´s stunning archeological ruins and explore some of the most spectacular sceneries on the planet way to the magnificent citadel of Machu Picchu.

name: Inspire yourself in Machu Picchu
description: Inspire yourself in the most beautiful sites of Peru with this seven-day tour of the country, starting in the capital, Lima, exploring the ancient core of the Inca Empire in Cusco, discovering the archaeological sites of the Incas in the Sacred Valley and culminating with an exciting visit to Machu Picchu at the top of the Andes. A dream trip you will never forget.

name: Inca Sunrise
description: The Inca Empire existed only for a century, but in that short time it left a patrimonial legacy that has turned Peru into one of the richest countries in the Americas.  For eight days you will visit the main attractions of the country, from Lima on the Pacific coast to Machu Picchu, the 'Lost City of the Incas', at the top of the Andes. Discover beautiful colonial cities, the sites of ancient civilizations and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet - an unforgettable experience.

name: Irresistible Peru
description: The Inca Empire only existed for a century, but in that short time it left a heritage that has turned Peru into one of countries with the largest cultural wealth in the Americas. You will get to know the main attractions of the country during eight days, from Lima on the Pacific coast to Machu Picchu, the îLost City of the Incasí, on the top of the Andes mountains. Discover beautiful colonial cities, the sites of ancient civilizations and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planeté an unforgettable experience.

name: Andean Experience
description: Enjoy the best of Peru with this return circuit from and back to Lima. Visit beautiful colonial cities, the legacy of ancient civilisations and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet. Meet the descendants of the Incas and the camelids of the Andes. Discover the Sacred Valley of the Incas, observe how the past is still alive in the islands of Lake Titicaca and undertake the pilgrimage to the peaks of the Andes to tour the magnificent citadel and mountain of Machu Picchu.

name: Air, Land and Sea
description: Explore Peru by air, sea and land for eight exciting days discovering the archaeological, cultural and natural treasures of the country. Discover the mysterious Nasca lines from the sky, sail to the abundant fauna of the wild Ballestas Islands and explore by land the sites of the Inca Empire and the beautiful colonial cities founded by Spanish conquistadors.

name: Living Culture
description: The great Andean plateau between Cusco and La Paz was at the centre of the Inca Empire. See the Navel of the World, descend into the Sacred Valley and climb to the summit of Machu Picchu. Sail Lake Titicaca to the floating islands of the Uros, cross to the Bolivian side in a catamaran and explore the ancient oracle on the Isla del Sol.

name: Wonders of Peru
description: Discover the wonders of Peru during 12 incredible days crossing this fascinating Andean country, visiting the main cities and cultural attractions. Starting in capital, Lima, the tour takes in the desert province of Ica, the gastronomic capital Arequipa, the Colca Valley, the indigenous worldcentered on Lake Titicaca, and the Inca and colonial heritage of Cusco, and Machu Picchu, the fabled ‘Lost City of the Incas’.

name: AMAZON STAR
description: Discovering the Amazon, the wildlife and the vegetation that compose it seems an endless task. However, there is a way to get closer to the essential elements of the rainforest: the Amazon Star. This fascinating boat will take passengers across the Amazon River on a journey of contact with nature will be present along the way.

name: SPECIAL PERU
description: As cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to 11 UNESCO World Heritage Sites listed, Peru is quite a special destination as you will discover over six fascinating days exploring the country. Visit beautiful colonial cities, impressive archaeological sites and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain.

name: Lights Inca Empire
description: The sun was the god of the Incas and bestowed its culture with the largest empire in pre-Columbian America, leaving a cultural and patrimonial legacy that still shines through centuries of colonization. For eight days traveling through Peru, you will discover the most emblematic sites of the empire such as the Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu and Cusco, ancient capital of the Incas.

name: Salkantay Expedition
description: When you arrive in Cusco, prepare to walk for several days through forests, discovering sites of ancient with fortifications and Inca cities, and all the while enjoying majestic views until reaching the impressive Salkantay mountain. In addition, you will discover the ancient capital of the Incas and the impressive historic sanctuary of Machu Picchu.

name: Explore Peru
description: Explore Peru and know its heritage, fauna and inhabitants during 10 dreamy days of crossing the country. This unforgettable circuit from and to Lima visits beautiful colonial cities, archaeological sites left by ancient civilizations and some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet. Admire the condor of the Colca Valley and the native camelids of the Andes. Discover the Sacred Valley of the Incas, observe how the past lives on the islands of Lake Titicaca and ascend Machu Picchu, the 'lost city of the Incas'.

name: Cosmopolitan Lima
description: Lima was the vice regal capital, as its splendid historic centre, designated a UNESCO World Heritage Site, attests. Baroque churches of great artistic and religious importance, mansions and town houses make colonial Lima into an unforgettable destination, not to mention its gastronomy, which is considered to be one of the best in the world.

name: Irresistible Lima
description: Spend four incredible days discovering the charms of irresistible Lima with visits to its main cultural and culinary attractions. Explore the capitalís beautiful historic downtown with its squares and old mansions, admire the pre-Columbian treasures on display at the Larco Museum, get to know the coastal Miraflores and the bohemian Barranco districts as well as the Pachacamac archaeological complex and savor the cityís exquisite gastronomic offering.

name: Inspire yourself in Machu Picchu
description: Get to know the best of Lima; the capital of Peru contains some true jewels for travellers, such as the Aliaga mansion, a colonial town house inhabited by the same family since 1535. Discover Cusco, the extraordinary archaeological capital of America. Explore Machu Picchu and rest in the Sacred Valley of the Incas

name: Lights Inca Empire
description: The sun was the god of the Incas and it permeated their culture with the largest empire in pre-Columbian America, a cultural and material legacy that still stands out despite centuries of Spanish colonial control. During eight days traveling through Peru, you will discover the most emblematic locations of the empire such as the Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu and Cusco, the ancient capital city of the Incas.

name: Irresistible Peru
description: The Inca Empire only existed for a century, but in that short time it left a heritage that has turned Peru into one of countries with the largest cultural wealth in the Americas. You will get to know the main attractions of the country during eight days, from Lima on the Pacific coast to Machu Picchu, the îLost City of the Incasí, on the top of the Andes mountains. Discover beautiful colonial cities, the sites of ancient civilizations and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planeté an unforgettable experience.

name: HISTORIC SACRED VALLEY
description: Being the cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to 11 UNESCO World Heritage Sites, Peru is quite a special destination as you will discover over six fascinating days exploring the country. Visit beautiful colonial cities, impressive archaeological sites and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain.

name: CUSCO AND SOUTHERN VALLEY
description: Being the cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to several UNESCO World Heritage Sites, Peru is quite a special destination as you will discover over six fascinating days exploring the country. Visit beautiful colonial cities, expansive ancient ruins in the Southern Valley and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain.

name: Wonders of Peru
description: Discover the wonders of Peru during 12 incredible days crossing this fascinating Andean country, visiting the main cities and cultural attractions. Starting in capital, Lima, the tourtakes in the desert province of Ica, the gastronomic capital Arequipa, the Colca Valley, the indigenous worldcentered on Lake Titicaca, and the Inca and colonial heritageof Cusco, and Machu Picchu, the fabled îLost City of the Incasí.

name: Southern Peru Treasures
description: Savor a southern sojourn for 13in this fascinating corner of Peru, visiting the main cities and cultural treasures. Starting and ending by the capital, Lima, the tourtakes in the gastronomic capital of Arequipa, the Colca Valley, the indigenous world centered on Lake Titicaca, and the Inca and colonial heritageof Cusco as well as Machu Picchu, the legendary îLost City of the Incasí.

name: CUSCO FAMILY JOURNEY
description: In this very special visit to Cusco, take a deep view at the bohemian side of the city. Experience the live culture of Cusco in activities that encompass art and tradition, where each detail, color and form tell us a story and the reason of being. Enjoy the city of Lima and be astounded by all what this modern and cosmopolitan capital of Peru has to offer to tourists.

name: SEA AND LAND ADVENTURE
description: When most people think of Peru, the imposing mountains of the Andes and certain animals like llamas or alpacas are some of the first things that come to mind. And though this is an accurate thought, Peru is much more than that – discover this for yourself as you embark on a comprehensive trip that covers the sea, desert, mountains, historical sites and more, including some adrenaline rushes.

name: GO LOCAL
description: Peru is a special destination that attracts visitors from all over the world to discover the country’s history, culture, architecture, gastronomy, traditions, and mysticism. But one of the best characteristics of the country is its friendly, welcoming people who wholeheartedly share their culture with visitors. Get to know the locals and enjoy Peru’s surroundings during eight days that take you to vast valleys, archaeological gems, colonial buildings, appetizing restaurants, local markets and more that show you the essence of the country.

name: HONEYMOON
description: Enjoy Lima and Cusco over 9 days in the best tour of the company. Travel through Peru on a journey that will strengthen your passion for life and create an everlasting bond with your significant other. Participate in a cooking class, discover breath-taking sceneries, get lost in ancient citadels and participate in a ceremony that will connect you to the Inca gods and Mother Earth in an unforgettable Peruvian experience.

name: HISTORICAL CAPITALS
description: The sun was the god of the Incas and bathed its culture with the largest empire in pre-Columbian America, leaving a cultural and patrimonial legacy that still shines through centuries of colonization. During seven days traveling through Peru, you will discover the most emblematic sites of the empire such as the Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu and Cusco, ancient capital of the Incas.

name: TRUJILLO & CUSCO
description: Discover Trujillo and Cusco during 10 days full of culture and history. Visit beautiful churches and historical buildings of the colonial era, as well as impressive ¨huacas¨, temples and archaeological complexes that belonged to ancient civilisations. Head to Cusco to discover the capital of the Inca Empire and the mysterious citadel of Machu Picchu.

name: ANDEAN SOUTHERN TREASURES
description: Discover the wonders of Peru during 12 incredible days crossing this awe-inspiring Andean country, visiting the main cities and cultural attractions. Arriving in the capital, Lima, the tour takes in the desert province of Ica, the gastronomic capital Arequipa, the Colca Valley, the indigenous world centred on Lake Titicaca and the Inca and colonial heritage of Cusco before culminating in Machu Picchu, the fabled ‘Lost City of the Incas’.

name: CUSCO ESSENTIALS
description: The sun was the god of the Incas and bathed its culture with the largest empire in pre-Columbian America, leaving a cultural and patrimonial legacy that still shines through centuries of colonization. During five days traveling through Peru, you will discover the most emblematic sites of the empire such as the Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu and Cusco, ancient capital of the Incas.

name: REGIONAL FLAVOURS
description: Lima is the capital of Peru, and recently declared Gastronomical Capital of America; a special destination that you will discover during four wonderful days visiting restaurants, the beautiful historic centre and old mansions. You will also visit the capital of the Inca Empire and taste the traditional recipes of the region and its local ingredients.

name: TASTE OF LIMA
description: Lima is commonly used as a gateway city to access Cuzco and Machu Picchu, however, it is a must see for tourists interested in exploring the history of this fascinating country through the many renowned museums the city has to offer. Visit the Churches of Santo Domingo, San Francisco and famous historical monuments including the Miguel Grau Monument and the Palace of Justice.

name: BEST OF PERU 14
description: As cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to 11 UNESCO World Heritage Sites listed, Peru is a special destination as you will discover over 14 fascinating days exploring the country. Visit beautiful colonial cities, impressive archaeological sites and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain.

name: BEST OF PERU 16
description: The Inca Empire only existed for a century, but in that short time it left a heritage that has turned Peru into one of countries with the largest cultural wealth in the Americas. You will get to know the main attractions of the country during 16 days, from Lima on the Pacific coast to Machu Picchu, the ‘Lost City of the Incas’, on the top of the Andes mountains. Discover beautiful colonial cities, the sites of ancient civilizations and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet– an unforgettable experience.

name: BEST OF PERU 21
description: Inmerge yourself visiting the 10 best places in Peru: Lima, Trujillo, Arequipa, Colca, Puno, Cusco, Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu, Puerto Maldonado and Paracas. Enjoy the misterious temples and palaces nestling in each city. Our culture is awe-inspiring.

name: HIGHLIGHTS OF PERU
description: Savor a southern sojourn for 13 days in this fascinating corner of Peru, visiting the main cities, cultural and natural treasures. Starting by the gastronomic capital of Lima,  get inspire of the natural scenery of Paracas,  the Inca and colonial heritageof Cusco as well as Machu Picchu, the legendary ‘Lost City of the Incas’ and the indigenous world centered on Titicaca lake.

name: TREASURES OF PERU
description: A unique experience for all your senses... Discover Lima as World Heritage listed by UNESCO and one of our recognized gastronomic cities. Afterwards you will head to the Sacred Valley where you will  enjoy a funny donkey ride in Maras! Continue on the experience by visiting a local community called "Huilloc".  Before  heading to Puno, you will go to Cusco with a trip to Machu Picchu, the icing on the cake! Truly an unforgetable adventure and one not to be missed. At the end, you will reach to the rustic charm of Puno.

name: CUSCO & SACRED VALLEY
description: Would you like to discover Machu Picchu? Embark on a voyage of discovery to Peru’s ancient Inca cities. Discover Cusco, the Inca capital, which is now one of the most beautiful colonial cities in the Americas, explore Inca archaeological sites  in Cusco and its surroundings, and cap it all off with a mesmerizing visit to the Machu Picchu, the fabled ‘lost city’ of the Incas, which was reclaimed from the jungle just over a century ago. This spellbinding tour combines history and culture with dramatic scenery over five intriguing days.

name: PUNO & SUASI PACKAGE
description: Are you ready to start feeling your senses at Suasi Island? This incredible Lodge, built with adobe and thatched with native high altitude grass called ichu, is rustic and charming, allowing guests to become more in tune with the environment that surrounds them.

name: INCA TRAIL
description: Break out of your routine and live the  experience of hiking our Inca trail. Reach to the Sun Gate at the end of a grueling four-day hike through big altitudes and vertical climbs, you will took your first look at an incredible and outstanding Machu Picchu.

name: Mystical Cusco
description: Cusco is a more than special destination, as you will discover for four fascinating days exploring its main attractions. Visit the Imperial City´s stunning archeological ruins and explore some of the most spectacular sceneries on the planet way to the magnificent citadel of Machu Picchu. Group sizes vary but typically range from 6 to 10 passengers.

name: BEST OF PERU 19
description: Discover the wonders of Peru during 19 incredible days crossing this fascinating Andean country, visiting the main cities and cultural attractions. Starting and ending by the gastronomic capital city, Lima, the circuit pass trough the Paracas  National Reserve; Arequipa, known as the "White City", the Coca Valley, Lake Titicaca’s indigenous world, and the Inca and colonial wealth in Cusco and Machu Picchu, the ‘Lost City of the Incas’.

name: CLASSIC OF PERU
description: This trip of a lifetime combines cultural and natural places along Peru. Admire amazing cliffs and scenery, explore extraordinary archaeological sites, enjoy beautiful lake and mountain views, hike through strikingly different climatic zones and finally experience the unique feeling of arriving at Machu Picchu.

name: Gran Tour delle Ande
description: Il sole era il dio degli Incas ed ha illuminato la loro cultura con il più grande impero in America precolombiana, lasciando un'eredità culturale e un patrimonio che tuttora brilla dopo secoli di colonizzazione. Durante sei giorni di viaggio attraverso il Perù, si potrà scoprire i luoghi più emblematici dell'impero come la Valle Sacra, Machu Picchu e Cusco, l'antica capitale degli Incas.

name: Peru in Liberta
description: Facile proposta di Perù in Libertà, per gli amanti dei viaggi 'Fai da te': Sono inclusi solo il volo intercontinentale, gli spostamenti interni (In autobus o in treno), I pernottamenti con prima colazione, I trasferimenti e le visite più complesse (su base collettiva). Il resto è lasciato alla vostra intrapredenza.

name: WALK THROUGH HISTORY
description: The sun was the god of the Incas and it permeated their culture with the largest empire in pre-Columbian America, a cultural and material legacy that still stands out despite centuries of Spanish colonial control. During eight days traveling through Peru, you will discover the most emblematic locations of the empire such as the Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu and Cusco, the ancient capital city of the Incas.

name: LIVING CULTURE
description: Greatly enjoy the best of Peru with this circuit from and to Lima. Visit beautiful colonial cities, the archeological sites of ancient civilizations and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet. Meet the descendants of the Incas, the native camelids of the highlands, and undertake the pilgrimage to the peaks of the Andes to visit the magnificent citadel and mountain of Machu Picchu. Watch how the past lives on the islands of Lake Titicaca, until you reach the city of La Paz and visit the Valley of the Moon.

name: MACHU PICCHU (VIaggidea)
description: Il Perù è un paese ricco di monumenti storici, ma c’è uno che spicca sopra tutti gli altri: è l'imponente “città perduta degli Incas” di Machu Picchu. Prendete Ispiratevi nella parte più bella del Perù con questo tour di sette giorni per tutto il paese, a partire dal capitale, Lima, esplorando l'antica sede dell'impero Inca a Cusco, scoprendo i siti archeologici degli Inca nella valle sacra e per ultimo, un emozionante visita a Machu Picchu sulla cima delle Ande. Un viaggio da sogno che non dimenticherete mai.

name: Meravigle del Sudamerica
description: Lima e Cuzco, due città in Perù impossibile da ovviare. Durante sei giorni conoscerete i bastioni culturali più emblematici della loro culture ancestrali fin dai tempi pre-Inca, attraversando l’epoca della colonia fino a raggiungere la modernità. Un'esperienza unica progettata per soddisfare le vostre aspettative di viaggio.

name: Peru in Liberta: Extensión Nazca/Paracas
description: Avrete l’opportunità di conoscere le misteriose linee di Nasca dall'aria, da una barca avrete la possibilità di ammirare l’abbondante fauna delle selvagge Isole Ballestas in un viaggio di 4 giorni che inizia nella città di Arequipa e culmina nella capitale Lima

name: Peru in Liberta: Extensión Colca
description: Esplorate Arequipa, la seconda città più grande del Perù. Ammirate il volo dei condor a Valle del Colca ed i camelidi originari delle Ande. Date uno sguardo al suo stile coloniale e le sue belle chiese, così come alle pampas che sono fuori della città, con uno spettacolare paesaggio

name: Peru Short & Sweet
description: Are you dreaming of seeing Machu Picchu, but have less than a week for your vacation? Explore Cuzco, the capital of the Inca Empire, with the charm of a 17th-Century colonial city, where Catholic cathedrals, ancient Inca ruins and modern life coexist. Venture out to the Sacred Valley, before your trip to the mystical citadel of Machu Picchu for an unforgettable experience.

name: Ultimate Peru: Lima
description: Fascinating Peru – rich in culture, history, and natural beauty – is a country that has so much to offer. Consider this program a good introduction to Peru. It covers Lima, the Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu, Cuzco, and Lake Titicaca – all a must-see for any first-time visitor. If you have more time, we highly recommend extending your stay – add an extension to a jungle lodge; see the Nazca Lines; there is much more to see in this country of many contrasts.

name: Classic Cusco Program
description: This brief extension will take you to the must see sites in Cusco and Machu Picchu. After a short flight we arrive in Cusco and tour the city. You will see a series of Inca ruins in the Capital of the Inca Empire including the Temple of the Sun, the Inca Fountains and the Sacsahuaman Fortress. A breathtaking train ride through the Sacred Valley will take you to the famous “lost city,” Machu Picchu with a full day tour of the site with a stay in the nearby villiage of Aguas Calientes.Recently, following UNESCO recommendations, Peruvian authorities have placed restrictions on the visitation of Machu Picchu, the lost Incan ruins. Currently, no more than 2,500 people daily will be allowed to visit the ruins. While these new restrictions are great for the preservation of the ruins, they may cause some difficulties in your ability to visit them, so we recommend booking with plenty of notice.

name: Mythical Machu Picchu
description: From the rich culture of Lima to the ancient Incan traditions of the Urubamba Valley and the historical importance of Cusco, your journey builds until you reach the mesmerizing legends that live in the mists of Machu Picchu. Here you’ll discover the mystic realm of ancient people and stand in wonder as this sacred place seems to come alive once again. Lima is home to several extensive collections of pre-Columbian art. Explore the ancient Inca capital of Cusco and the archaeological ruins that lay in the nearby “Sacred Valley,” alive with colorful markets and local craftsmen. Enjoy a scenic train journey to “The Lost City of the Incas,” where the 15th-century ruins of Machu Picchu come to life as your guide regales you with colorful legends.

name: Short Cusco & Machu Picchu
description: This brief extension will take you to the must see sites in Cusco and Machu Picchu. After a short flight we arrive in Cusco and tour the city. You will see a series of Inca ruins in the Capital of the Inca Empire including the Temple of the Sun, the Inca Fountains and the Sacsahuaman Fortress. A breathtaking train ride through the Sacred Valley will take you to the famous “lost city,” Machu Picchu with a full day tour of the site with a stay in the nearby villiage of Aguas Calientes.Recently, following UNESCO recommendations, Peruvian authorities have placed restrictions on the visitation of Machu Picchu, the lost Incan ruins. Currently, no more than 2,500 people daily will be allowed to visit the ruins. While these new restrictions are great for the preservation of the ruins, they may cause some difficulties in your ability to visit them, so we recommend booking with plenty of notice.

name: Historic Sacred Valley
description: As cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to 11 UNESCO World Heritage Sites listed, Peru is quite a special destination as you will discover over six fascinating days exploring the country. Visit beautiful colonial cities, impressive archaeological sites and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain. Groups vary in size, but are typically made up of about 6-10 travelers.

name: MAGICAL CUSCO
description: Cusco is a more than special destination, as you will discover for four fascinating days exploring its main attractions. Visit the Imperial City´s stunning archeological ruins and explore some of the most spectacular sceneries on the planet way to the magnificent citadel of Machu Picchu. Group sizes vary but typically range from 6 to 10 passengers.

name: The Inca Trail
description: Many are the routes that take you to Machu Picchu, but there is none like the Inca Trail, the most famous trekking route in the Americas. Arriving in Cusco, prepare to walk for four days on a path through forests and dense fogs, ancient stone steps and discover the remains of ancient fortifications and Inca cities, while enjoying breathtaking views. Following a 46km walk at the top of the Andes, you will be handsomely rewarded with the first exciting views of Machu Picchu from IntiPunku. This guided tour is a unique experience that will remain engraved in your heart forever.

name: THE GRAND PERUVIAN SOUTH
description: See the best of Peru during this 15-day southern sojourn in this fascinating corner of Peru, visiting the country’s main cities and cultural treasures. Starting in in the capital city of Lima and ending in Cusco, this tour takes in the gastronomic capital of Arequipa, the Colca Valley, the indigenous world centered on Lake Titicaca, and the Inca and colonial heritage of Cusco as well as Machu Picchu, the legendary ‘Lost City of the Incas’.

name: CUSCO AND PUNO LEGACY OF THE INCA EMPIRE
description: The cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to 11 UNESCO World Heritage Sites, Peru is quite a special destination as you will discover over seven fascinating days exploring the country. Visit beautiful colonial cities, impressive archaeological sites and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain.

name: MYSTICAL CUSCO
description: Cusco is a more than special destination, as you will discover for four fascinating days exploring its main attractions. Visit the Imperial City´s stunning archeological ruins and explore some of the most spectacular sceneries on the planet way to the magnificent citadel of Machu Picchu.

name: Cusco and Southern Valley
description: As cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to 11 UNESCO World Heritage Sites listed, Peru is quite a special destination as you will discover over six fascinating days exploring the country. Visit beautiful colonial cities, impressive archaeological sites and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain. Groups vary in size, but are typically made up of about 6-10 travelers.

name: Legendary Inca Trail
description: Many are the routes that lead to Machu Picchu, but none of them is quite like the Inca Trail, the most famous pathway in the Americas. After flying from the capital, Lima, to Cusco, which you explore along with other ancient Inca sites in the Sacred Valley, you begin a four-day odyssey high in the Andes, crossing forests and thick mists, climbing thousand-year-old stone steps and discovering the sites of ruined Inca fortresses and cities, while enjoying majestic views. The reward comes with the first, exciting sighting of Machu Picchu from the Inti Punku followed by a tour of the citadel itself. This guided route is a unique experience, which you will treasure forever. Groups vary in size, but are typically made up of about 6-10 travelers.

name: Salkantay Majestic Route
description: Take the high road to Machu Picchu with an adventure on an ancient trail just below the snow limit and over majestic mountain passes. Mt Salkantay is a powerful ‘Apu’ – a mountain spirit in Andean mythology and a female deity who protects the local Quechua. ‘Salkantay’ means ‘she who cannot be tamed’ or ‘wild one’ and route traverses a high plateau amidst the mountain range and then descends to the bottom of a lush jungle valley. Groups vary in size, but are typically made up of about 6-10 travelers.

name: ANDEAN EXPERIENCE
description: Enjoy the best of Peru to the fullest with this round-trip from and to Lima. Visit beautiful colonial cities, the sites of ancient civilizations, and explore some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet. Get to know the descendants of the Incas and the endemic camelids of the Andes. Discover the Sacred Valley of the Incas; see first-hand how the past still lives on the islands of Lake Titicaca, and make a pilgrimage to the snowcapped peaks of the Andes to explore the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain.

name: CLASSIC PERU PROGRAM
description: This trip of a lifetime combines cultural and natural places along Peru. Admire amazing cliffs and scenery, explore extraordinary archaeological sites, enjoy beautiful lake and mountain views, hike through strikingly different climatic zones and finally experience the unique feeling of arriving at Machu Picchu.

name: CUSCO & SACRED VALLEY
description: The sun was the god of the Incas and it permeated their culture with the largest empire in pre-Columbian America, a cultural and material legacy that still stands out despite centuries of Spanish colonial control. During four days traveling through Peru, you will discover the most emblematic locations of the empire such as the Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu and Cusco, the ancient capital city of the Incas.

name: PERU PREISWERT
description: Diese einzigartige Reise kombiniert Kulturelle Orte  und Natur. Bewundern Sie erstaunliche Klippen und Landschaften, entdecken Sie außergewöhnliche archäologische Stätten, genießen Sie schöne Seen, wandern Sie durch unterschiedliche Klimazonen und erleben Sie schließlich das einzigartige Gefühl in Machu Picchu anzukommen.

description: Diese einzigartige Reise kombiniert Kulturelle Orte  und Natur. name: CLASSIC PERU
description: This trip of a lifetime combines cultural and natural places along Peru. Admire amazing scenery, explore extraordinary archaeological sites, enjoy a beautiful lake and mountain views and finally experience the unique feeling of arriving at Machu Picchu.

name: NORTHERN KINGDOM
description: Discover Trujillo and Chiclayo in northern Peru, for 4 days filled with sun and culture. Visit beautiful churches and mansions of the colonial era, as well as impressive huacas, temples and archaeological sites that belonged to ancient civilizations. Walk through museums, the Chicama Valley and enjoy marine flavors offered by the Peruvian sea.

name: INCA TRAIL
description: Break out of your routine and live the  experience of hiking our Inca trail. Reach to the Sun Gate at the end of a grueling four-day hike through big altitudes and vertical climbs, you will took your first look at an incredible and outstanding Machu Picchu.

name: PERU LAND OF THE INCAS
description: As cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to 11 UNESCO World Heritage Sites listed, Peru is quite a special destination as you will discover over seven fascinating days exploring the country. Start with Lima, capital of Peru, a special destination that you will discover during three wonderful days visiting its main attractions. Know its exquisite cuisine, the beautiful historic center with its squares and old residences, the Larco Museum, the districts of Miraflores and Barranco, wonderful boardwalk. Continue to Cusco and visit beautiful colonial cities, impressive archaeological sites and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel and mountain. Groups vary in size, but are typically made up of about 6-10 travelers.

name: Southern Peru Treasures
description: Savor a southern sojourn for 13in this fascinating corner of Peru, visiting the main cities and cultural treasures. Starting and ending by the capital, Lima, the tourtakes in the gastronomic capital of Arequipa, the Colca Valley, the indigenous world centered on Lake Titicaca, and the Inca and colonial heritageof Cusco as well as Machu Picchu, the legendary Lost City of the Incas.

name: PERU PRIVAT
description: Entdecken Sie auf dieser Reise die Attraktionen Perus: das geheimnisvolle Machu Picchu, neu entdeckte Ausgrabungsstätten und das unglaubliche Panorama der Anden. Kommen Sie mit uns ganz privat nach Peru und erleben Sie eine faszinierende Reise, die Ihnen noch lange in Erinnerung bleiben wird!

name: Peru Special
description: Tour of colonial and pre-Hispanic Lima. Get to know Cusco. See the Sacred Valley and touch the clouds in Machu Picchu. Visit the Inca architecture in Moray, Maras or Tipón and note that in the Andean world architecture and sculpture are almost the same concept.

name: WONDERFUL CUSCO
description: The Inca Empire existed for only a century, but in that short time it left a legacy that has turned Peru into one of countries with the largest cultural wealth in the Americas. Discover the main attractions of the country over eight enchanting days, from Lima on the Pacific coast to Machu Picchu, the ‘Lost City of the Incas’, high up in the Andes mountains. Explore beautiful colonial cities, the ruins of ancient civilizations and behold some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet– an unforgettable experience. Groups vary in size, but are typically made up of about 6-10 travelers.

name: Living Culture
description: The great Andean plateau between Cusco and La Paz was at the centre of the Inca Empire. See the Navel of the World, descend into the Sacred Valley and climb to the summit of Machu Picchu. Sail Lake Titicaca to the floating islands of the Uros, cross to the Bolivian side in a catamaran and explore the ancient oracle on the Isla del Sol.

name: Inca Dawns
description: Enjoy the passage of time in La Maravilla. Dawn in Machu Picchu is an extraordinary experience. Visit the Sacred Valley of the Incas, Tipón and the Wari village at Piquillacta "Small City or City of Fleas". Understand Lima's Andean roots and Hispanic overlay.

name: Exploring Peru
description: See the best of the Southern Circuit. Start in Lima, with its pre-Hispanic past and a colonial-era mansion that has been inhabited continuously since the 16th Century. In Arequipa, enjoy a city where time has stood still and explore the vast Colca Canyon. Cross the Andean plateau to Puno and sail Lake Titicaca to the floating islands of the Uros. Stroll around Cusco's cobbled streets and admire Machu Picchu.

name: LEGENDARY INCA TRAIL
description: Many are the routes that lead to Machu Picchu, but none of them is quite like the Inca Trail, the most famous pathway in the Americas. After flying from the capital, Lima, to Cusco, which you explore along with other ancient Inca sites in the Sacred Valley, you begin a four-day odyssey high in the Andes, crossing forests and thick mists, climbing thousand-year-old stone steps and discovering the sites of ruined Inca fortresses and cities, while enjoying majestic views. The reward comes with the first, exciting sighting of Machu Picchu from the IntiPunku followed by a tour of the citadel itself. This guided route is a unique experience, which you will treasure forever.

name: SALKANTAY MAJESTIC ROUTE
description: Take the high road to Machu Picchu with an adventure on an ancient trail just below the snow limit and over majestic mountain passes. Mt Salkantay is a powerful ‘Apu’ – a mountain spirit in Andean mythology and a female deity who protects the local Quechua. ‘Salkantay’ means ‘she who cannot be tamed’ or ‘wild one’ and route traverses a high plateau amidst the mountain range and then descends to the bottom of a lush jungle valley.

name: DIE LICHTER DES INKAREICHES
description: Die Sonne war die Göttin der Inkas: Sie war in ihrer Kultur allgegenwärtig und verhalf ihnen dazu, das größte Reich im präkolumbianischen Amerika zu werden. Trotz Jahrhunderte von spanischer Kolonialherrschaft ist das hervorragende kulturelle und materielle Erbe der Inkas ausgezeichnet erhalten geblieben. Die achttägige Entdeckungsreise durch Peru bringt Sie in die berühmtesten Orte des Reiches, wie das Heilige Tal, Machu Picchu und Cusco, die historische Hauptstadt der Inkas. Die Gruppen sind unterschiedlich groß, aber bestehen in der Regel aus ca. 6-10 Reisenden.

name: CLASSIC PERU
description: This trip of a lifetime combines cultural and natural places along Peru. Admire amazing cliffs and scenery, explore extraordinary archaeological sites, enjoy the mountain views, hike through strikingly different climatic zones and experience the unique feeling of arriving at Machu Picchu. Finally, visit the impressive Colca Canyon, you´ve never seen anything like this.

name: CLASSIC PERU
description: As cradle of one of the most enigmatic civilizations in history and home to 11 UNESCO World Heritage Sites listed, Peru is quite a special destination as you will discover over ten fascinating days exploring the country. Start at Lima, capital of Peru, a special destination that you will discover during one wonderful day visiting its main attractions. Continue to Cusco and visit beautiful colonial cities, impressive archaeological sites and discover some of the most spectacular landscapes on the planet en route to the magnificent Machu Picchu citadel. Discover the Sacred Valley of the Incas, observe how the past lives on the islands of Lake Titicaca and ascends Machu Picchu, the 'lost city of the Incas'. And finally Puno unveils the visual charms of the impressive highest lake on the planet, a multicolored adventure.

name: UNWIDERSTEHLICHES PERU
description: Das Inkareich bestand nur ein Jahrhundert, aber es hinterließ ein derart bedeutungsvolles Erbe, dass Peru heute eines der Länder mit dem größten kulturellen Reichtum auf dem amerikanischen Kontinent ist. Innerhalb von acht Tagen werden Sie die wichtigsten Sehenswürdigkeiten des Landes kennenlernen, von der Hauptstadt Lima an der Pazifikküste bis nach Machu Picchu, der „verlorenen Stadt der Inkas“ auf dem Gipfel der Anden. Besuchen Sie wunderschöne Kolonialstädte und archäologische Stätten von historischen Zivilisationen, und entdecken Sie einige der spektakulärsten Landschaften der Erde – ein insgesamt unvergessliches Erlebnis. Die Gruppen sind unterschiedlich groß, aber bestehen in der Regel aus ca. 6-10 Reisenden.

name: ABENTEUER ANDEN
description: Genießen Sie Perus Höhepunkte in vollen Zügen auf einer Rundreise, die in der Stadt Lima beginnt und endet. Besuchen Sie wunderschöne Kolonialstädte und archäologische Stätte von historischen Zivilisationen, und entdecken Sie einige der spektakulärsten Landschaften der Erde. Lernen Sie die Nachfahren der Inkas und die einheimischen Andenkamele kennen. Entdecken Sie das Heilige Tal der Inkas und erleben Sie aus erster Hand, wie die Vergangenheit auf den Inseln des Titicacasees allgegenwärtig ist. Oder pilgern Sie zu den schneebedeckten Gipfel der Anden, um die prächtige Zitadelle von Machu Picchu und die benachbarten Berge zu erkunden.

name: Lebendige Kultur
description: Entdecken Sie die Magie und Schönheit von Peru und dem Westen Boliviens während Sie 10 unvergessliche Tage diese erstaunlichen Andenländer erkunden und die wichtigsten kulturellen und historischen Sehenswürdigkeiten auf beiden Seiten des Titicaca-Sees besuchen. Beginnen Sie Ihre Reise in Lima, der Hauptstadt von Peru. Anschließend erleben Sie das einzigartige Erbe der Inkas und der spanischen Kolonialzeit in Cusco und werden in die „verlorene Stadt der Inkas“ gebracht, die weltbekannte Zitadelle von Machu Picchu. Außerdem haben Sie die Möglichkeit, die historischen Traditionen der Einheimischen rund um den Titicaca-See hautnah zu erleben. Als Letztes, überqueren Sie die Grenze und fahren nach La Paz, der Hauptstadt von Bolivien, und besuchen die außerirdisch wirkenden Landschaften des Mondtals.

name: DIE SCHÄTZE IM SÜDEN PERUS
description: Erleben Sie eine unvergessliche, 13-tägige Reise durch den Süden Perus und entdecken Sie die faszinierenden Schätze dieser Region indem Sie die wichtigsten Städte und kulturellen Sehenswürdigkeiten besuchen. Ihre Reise beginnt und endet in der Hauptstadt Lima. Ihr erster Halt ist die Stadt Arequipa und ihre zelebrierte Gastronomie. Danach geht es weiter in den atemberaubenden Colca Tal. Von dort aus fahren Sie zum Titicaca-See und erleben authentische indigene Traditionen hautnah. Ihr letzter Höhepunkt ist schließlich die legendäre „verlorene Stadt der Inkas“, Machu Picchu.

name: NEUE WUNDER VON PERU
description: Entdecken Sie die Wunder von Peru auf einer unglaublichen 15-tägigen Reise durch dieses faszinierende Anden-Land und besuchen Sie die wichtigsten Städten und Sehenswürdigkeiten. Ihre Reise beginnt und endet in der Hauptstadt Lima und führt Sie durch die Wüstenregion Ica über den gastronomischen Höhepunkten von Arequipa, dem Colca-Tal und der einheimischen Gastfreundschaft am Titicaca-See bis in die historische Stadt Cusco und nach Machu Picchu, der verlorenen Stadt der Inkas.

name: INKA TRAIL
description: Viele sind die Wege, die nach Machu Picchu führen, aber keiner ist ganz wie der Inka-Trail, der berühmteste Wanderweg im amerikanischen Kontinent. Nachdem Sie aus der Hauptstadt Lima in Cusco gelandet sind und die historischen Inka-Stätten in der Umgebung und im Heiligen Tal besucht haben, beginnen Sie eine viertägige Odyssee hoch in die Anden. Sie wandern durch Wälder und dicken Nebel, laufen tausend Jahre alte Steintreppen hoch und entdecken die Standorte der zerstörten Inka-Festungen und Städte, während Sie den Ausblick über majestätische Landschaften genießen. Die ganz große Belohnung erfolgt mit der ersten, aufregenden Sichtung von Machu Picchu aus der archäologischen Stätte von Inti Punku. Später erkunden Sie die berühmte Zitadelle selbst. Diese geführte Route ist ein einzigartiges Erlebnis, das Sie für immer in Erinnerung behalten werden.

name: RESERVA AMAZÓNICA
description: Erkundigen Sie den Regenwald rund um Puerto Maldonado, indem Sie das unglaublich exotische Inkaterra Reserva Amazónica als Hauptlager nutzen. Entdecken Sie die endlosen Fauna und Flora des Dschungels und wandern Sie auf Schotterwegen oder fahren Sie auf dem herrlichen Fluss Madre de Dios. Bewundern Sie die fantastische Artenvielfalt im Naturschutzgebiet Tambopata und nutzen Sie ein erstaunliches Netzwerk von Hängebrücken, um einen Eindruck vom Amazonaswald aus den hohen Baumkronen zu bekommen.

name: RESERVA AMAZÓNICA
description: Erkundigen Sie den Regenwald rund um Puerto Maldonado, indem Sie das unglaublich exotische Inkaterra Reserva Amazónica als Hauptlager nutzen. Entdecken Sie die endlosen Fauna und Flora des Dschungels und wandern Sie auf Schotterwegen oder fahren Sie auf dem herrlichen Fluss Madre de Dios. Bewundern Sie die fantastische Artenvielfalt im Naturschutzgebiet Tambopata und nutzen Sie ein erstaunliches Netzwerk von Hängebrücken, um einen Eindruck vom Amazonaswald aus den hohen Baumkronen zu bekommen.

name: HACIENDA CONCEPCION
description: Tauchen Sie in den Regenwald rund um Puerto Maldonado ein und nutzen Sie die atemberaubende Inkaterra Hacienda Concepción als Hauptlager. Entdecken Sie die endlosen Fauna und Flora des Dschungels und wandern Sie auf Schotterwegen oder fahren Sie auf dem herrlichen Fluss Madre de Dios. Bewundern Sie die fantastische Artenvielfalt im Naturschutzgebiet Tambopata und nutzen Sie ein erstaunliches Netzwerk von Hängebrücken, um einen Eindruck vom Amazonaswald aus den hohen Baumkronen zu bekommen.

name: HACIENDA CONCEPCION
description: Tauchen Sie in den Regenwald rund um Puerto Maldonado ein und nutzen Sie die atemberaubende Inkaterra Hacienda Concepción als Hauptlager. Entdecken Sie die endlosen Fauna und Flora des Dschungels und wandern Sie auf Schotterwegen oder fahren Sie auf dem herrlichen Fluss Madre de Dios. Bewundern Sie die fantastische Artenvielfalt im Naturschutzgebiet Tambopata und nutzen Sie ein erstaunliches Netzwerk von Hängebrücken, um einen Eindruck vom Amazonaswald aus den hohen Baumkronen zu bekommen.

name: CUSCO AND MACHU PICCHU
description: This one week trip explores the famous sites of the Incas including Cusco, the Sacred Valley and concluding at the magnificent ruins of Machu Picchu. Rather than rush back to Cusco, we spend a night at Aguas Calientes, with an opportunity to soak in the hot springs before heading up to Machu Picchu for sun rise. We also spend ample time in Cusco savouring and acclimatizing in this great Inca city.

name: AMAZON RAINFOREST
description: The Tambopata Reserve is considered to be home to the world’s greatest concentrations of birds and butterflies. From the comfort of beautifully set lodges we explore the jungle by foot and boat to maximise our chances of spotting wildlife.

name: TAMBOPATA RAINFOREST - 4 DAY
description: The Tambopata Reserve is considered to be home to the world’s greatest concentrations of birds and butterflies. From the comfort of beautifully set lodges we explore the jungle by foot and boat to maximise our chances of spotting wildlife.

name: NAZCA, BALLESTAS AND COLCA CANYON
description: An ideal fast paced extension for those wishing to see the coast, desert and canyons of Peru. From Lima, we head to the Ballestas Islands for a wildlife cruise and onto the famous Nazca Lines. We continue to Arequipa and the fabulous Colca Canyon, home to the magnificent Andean Condor.

name: NAZCA LINES AND BALLESTAS ISLANDS
description: An ideal short extension for those wishing to see the coast and desert of Peru. From Lima, we head south to the vibrant Chincha which was once a Spanish colonial stronghold, to spend the night before heading to the Ballestas Islands for a wildlife cruise. We then travel via the oasis town of Ica to Nazca, home to the famous Nazca Lines carved into the desert and spend time viewing these amazing lines and shapes before returning to Lima

name: PERU, ECUADOR AND THE GALAPAGOS

Combine the magic of Cusco, Machu Picchu and Lake Titicaca with the markets of Otavalo, the stunning ‘Avenue of the Volcanoes’ and the unique wildlife of the Galapagos Islands. From Lima, we fly across the backbone of the Andes to Cusco and the Sacred Valley where we discover the heartland of the Inca Empire. From the magnificent Machu Picchu we cross the vast altiplano to Lake Titicaca.

name: COLCA CANYON AND AREQUIPA
description: Arequipa is the home of the beautiful Santa Catalina Convent and the gateway to one of the world’s deepest canyons, the Colca. Explore the Colca, which is twice the depth of the Grand Canyon and we hope to view the huge Andean Condor soaring in the early morning thermals overhead.

name: BEST OF PERU

Starting by the capital, Lima, the tour takes in the gastronomic capital of Arequipa, the Colca Valley, the indigenous world centered on Lake Titicaca, and the Inca and colonial heritage of Cusco as well as Machu Picchu, the legendary ‘Lost City of the Incas’.

Discover the mystery of the Nazca Lines - a fascinating collection of animal pictures etched into the ground with great precision, during an unknown period. Farther south, the Ballestas Islands Reserve affords an opportunity to see a sea lion, flamingo and Humbolt penguin.

Lima is the only South American capital facing the sea, which allows you to practice water activities such as kayaking or surfing. Delight yourself with the history and culture of Cusco. name: PERUVIAN FLAVORS
description: Lima is the capital of Peru, a special destination that you will discover during wonderful days visiting its main attractions. On the other hand Cusco is a destination more than special, as you will discover for days touring its main attractions. Visit the imperial city. Meet the exquisite cuisine that both destinations offer, tour the beautiful historic center of the city with its squares and old residences.

name: CLASSIC INCA TRAIL (PRIVATE TREK)
description: This classic trek along the historic Inca Trail is considered by many to be one of the great short treks of the world, and is a superb introduction to trekking in the Andes. Importantly, we spend ample time in Cusco and the Sacred Valley whilst acclimatising to the altitude before heading out onto the trail. Our Inca Trail itinerary differs from most as we avoid the busier campsites. We ascend the jungle trails and cloud forest to appreciate the panorama of Andean peaks that would have inspired the Inca people as we make our way to Machu Picchu. Words cannot describe the exhilaration of the first sighting of these enigmatic ruins. Rather than heading back to Cusco we spend a night in Aguas Calientes, and this vitally gives us the opportunity to visit Machu Picchu at its best, early the following morning.

name: SOUTH AMERICAN PANORAMA
description: This journey has been specifically devised for the active non.trekker who is seeking more than just a tour. We share the South America we know best as our experienced local guides introduce you to the cultural and geographic highlights of their homeland. This outstanding journey commences in Buenos Aires and continues on the beautiful Iguazu Falls. After wandering the former Spanish capital of Lima we head to our comfortable lodge deep in the Amazon jungle to enjoy gentle walks and canoe trips. In Cusco we immerse ourselves in the colourful markets before gaining insights into the legendary Inca culture in the Sacred Valley. We continue onto the remarkable ruins of Machu Picchu, perched spectacularly above the Urubamba River. We cross the altiplano to Lake Titicaca where we take small boats to the reed islands of the Uros Indians, before heading to the Bolivian capital of La Paz with visits to the markets and local “penas” (live music venues), to feel the cultural pulse of Bolivia.

name: INCA TRAIL ADVENTURE (PRIVATE TREK)
description: This classic trek along the Inca Trail is considered by many to be one of the great short treks of the world, and is a superb introduction to trekking in the Andes. Our Inca Trail Adventure differs from most as we avoid the busier camp sites. We ascend the jungle trails and cloud forests to appreciate the panorama of Andean peaks that would have inspired the Inca people as we make our way to Machu Picchu. Words cannot describe the exhilaration of the first sighting of these enigmatic ruins. Rather than heading back to Cusco we spend a night in Aguas Calientes, and this vitally gives us the opportunity to visit Machu Picchu at its best, early the following morning before the crowds arrive.

name: Salkantay Trek & Machu Picchu (Private trek)
description: Arguably the best short trek alternative to the classic Inca Trail. Our Salcantay Trek follows an ancient Inca trail located in the same region as the Inca Trail where dramatic mountain scenery is complemented with lush subtropical jungle. There are also two very interesting Inca sites on this route one on the drive to the trailhead and another on the last day of the trail. These add a further dimension to this trek which also includes spectacular close up views of Mount Salcantay regarded by the locals as sacred and certainly one of the most stunning snowpeaks in the Peruvian Andes. The highest point on this alternative trek is the Salcantay Pass at 4,640m which is slightly higher than the highest point on the classic Inca Trail at Warmihuañusca Pass at 4,200m. Discover the magnificent ruins of Machu Picchu before returning to Cusco.

name: Inca Trail and Jungle Adventure (Private trek)
description: From historic Cusco to jungle adventures in the Amazon and the legendary Inca Trail trek, this incredible trip does it all. Enjoy the stunning drive from Cusco to the Sacred Valley via Chinchero and the salt pans at Maras before commencing one of the finest short treks in the world. The Inca Trail includes the beautiful trek to Hatunchaca, over the first pass to Pacaymayu and on over the second and third pass to Phuyupatamarca, the enchanting the city in the clouds, where the views of the Andes will astound even the most seasoned trekker. From here the trail winds through the Gateway of the Sun to Machu Picchu, where we spend ample time exploring this amazing and enigmatic site. The spectacular drive from Cusco to Puerto Maldonado in the rainforest is a highlight as is the river boat journey and rainforest walk to Sandoval Lake Lodge . the perfect base for rainforest walks, wildlife spotting and exploration of the lake by canoe. This memorable journey concludes with a boat trip to the jungle town of Puerto Maldonado.

name: Huaraz and Cordillera Blanca
description: The Cordillera Blanca is considered by many to be the most spectacular mountain regions of Peru, if not the whole of South America. North of Lima is Huaraz, where we base ourselves for a series of day walks in the Cordillera Blanca, home to Huarascaran, Peru’s highest peak, where we enter this wild and dramatic landscape of towering peaks and glaciers from the comfort of our hotel.

name: Cultural Highlights of Peru
description: This extraordinary touring adventure encompasses the highlights of Peru’s diverse and rich cultural past. We commence in the current capital of Lima and explore the Spanish colonial city before taking a spectacular flight across the Andes to Cusco, the former capital of the vast Inca empire. From here we make forays into the Sacred Valley of the Incas, the unique ruins of Ollantaytambo and the famous site of Machu Picchu. We then cross the vast high altitude plains on a classic railway journey aboard the Orient Express to the shores of Lake Titicaca, where we visit the reed islands of the intriguing Uros Indians. Our trip concludes on arrival back into Lima.

name: Huayhuash Circuit
description: The Cordillera Huayhuash is one of the most spectacular ranges in the Peruvian Andes. It?was the region that attracted worldwide attention following Joe Simpson’s dramatic account?of his near-fatal climb of Siula Grande in his book, ‘Touching the Void’. This challenging full circuit trek is the best way to fully appreciate the sheer scale and beauty of these snow-capped summits, including Yerupaja, the second highest mountain in Peru. Our trip includes ample time for acclimatisation in?Huaraz and the Cordillera Blanca before spending 11 days crossing stunning high passes, all in the vicinity of 5,000 m. Each day provides us with an ever-changing backdrop of soaring peaks including the distinctive needle-like peak of Jirishanca and the impressive summit of Yerupaja. Each night we set up camp in remote locations alongside alpine meadows and brilliant blue glacial lagoons in this unrivalled corner of the Andes. For the lover of high mountain regions, it would be hard to beat this exceptional trek.

name: Inca Rivers trek - Choquequirao to Machu Picchu
description: Stunning views of snow-covered Andean peaks, ancient cloud forest, abundant wildflowers and the Inca ruins of Choquequirao are just some of the highlights of this outstanding trek. Our route follows a mountain traverse between two sacred Inca rivers - to the west the Apurimac and to the east the Urubamba. These mighty rivers are the main tributaries of the Amazon. Between them lies the great Vilcabamba Mountain Range - the last stronghold of the Inca Empire. Unique to this area is the spectacular ‘lost’ ruins of Choquequirao. Built by the Incas in the 15th century, like Machu Picchu, it became lost in high jungle which engulfed the ruins until being rediscovered in the early 20th century. A day is set aside to explore this impressive site before continuing our trek to the Inca site at Patallacta which provides a stunning and rarely seen view of our final destination - Machu Picchu.

name: Best of South America - Over 55s adventure
description: On this complete panorama of South America we combine the cultural highlights with time in the Amazon jungle and a welldevised trek in the Andes. If you have not trekked before don’t worry, our “five” star trekking service will ensure a safe and satisfying experience. Exploring the cultural dimensions of our journey we travel from Buenos Aires, the vibrant Paris of South America, and the magnificent Iguazu Falls to Lima. We continue onto Cusco, with its endearing Inca and Spanish heritage and La Paz with its colourful markets and live music clubs. By contrast, the more active stages of the program will provide further enduring memories. In the rainforest of the Amazon jungle, we undertake gentle canoe trips in search of the prolific birdlife, while in the Andes we trek on ancient pathways. In the company of our experienced guides we follow sections of what were once ancient Inca Trails past traditional villages before finally ascending to the cloud forest to join the last section of the legendary Inca Trail into Machu Picchu.

name: Alpamayo Circuit
description: Without a doubt, the Cordillera Blanca range provides some of the world’s most spectacular and varied trekking and climbing landscapes. The range boasts more than 50 peaks over 5,700 m (18,700 ft), of which some 20 peaks surpass 6,000 m (19,685 ft). At 6,768 m (22,205 ft), Huascarán is Peru’s highest mountain, and yet it’s the pyramid peak of Alpamayo that is said by many to be the country’s most spectacular. Seasoned trekkers and climbers from around the world agree—Alpamayo is a peak of overwhelming beauty. Within this 170 km-long mountain range we find the greatest concentration of tropical-zone glaciers on earth. Turquoise glacial lakes abound and vertical granite walls rise thousands of metres into the sky. Our Alpamayo Circuit trek weaves a route through the heart of the mountains, crossing a number of high passes that lead us into valleys with remarkably varied mountain landscapes. The focal point of the trek, the famous Alpamayo pyramid was once voted the most beautiful mountain in the world. Our expedition sees us cross the continental divide and, after a succession of stunning views, finds us camping at the amazing Avalancha Campsite (4,650 m / 15,256 ft) where we look down as avalanches crash from immense fissured glaciers on the flanks of the Conrahierbas massif. As we trek we pass through remote farming communities that greet us with warm hospitality and allows us to gain insights into traditional Quechua Indian ways of life. The trek ends after our final breathtaking pass at 4,850 m and descent to the Ulta valley. This adventure has been designed with acclimatisation in mind and to ensure that the ‘work’ of trekking is properly rewarded by the satisfaction of being in an incredibly beautiful place!

name: Vinicunca, the colors of the Incas
description: Cusco is one of the favourite destinations for adventure lovers. This seven-day trip around the Imperial City is the perfect mix between history and outdoor activities, with two walks that will connect you with nature and the Inca spirit that reigns in the city; as well as an unmissable visit to Machu Picchu, the heart of the most important pre-colonial empire in South America.

Enjoy days of relaxation and adventure while being attended to by a great team of professionals.

description: Cusco is known for its Inca history, its impressive archaeological centres and its beautiful colonial heritage seen in its churches and mansions. However, it is the living culture that gives it the charm that makes it unique, the towns that still preserve their mystical heritage and Andean traditions. Discover on this trip the true essence of the life of the Andean man, living in a community and being part of their beliefs and rituals in a unique experience.
